# Mesocycle 1

DB weights per hand · BB weights total · BW = bodyweight

**Updates as of Apr 30:**
1. Triceps Overhead Ext → Triceps Pushdown for the rest of Mesocycle 1 (elbow strain, Session 1). Revisit OH ext in Mesocycle 2.
2. DB Reverse Lunge → Heel-Elevated Goblet Squat permanently (knee pain).
3. EZ-Bar Curl → DB Curl (equipment preference).
4. Standing Calf Raise removed from all sessions (no motivation).
5. Lower back cleared by Session 4 — appears isolated to BB Squat. Session 5 BB Squat is the real test.
6. Triceps Pushdown weights dialed back to 20 lb (yellow flag on elbow). Re-test Session 5.
7. Lat Pulldown grip distinction (neutral A / chin B) collapsed — same handle every session.
8. Lat Pulldown progression corrected: 4 sessions @ 90×10 → push reps before adding weight. 12 reps Session 4 ✓, target 15 next, then 100 lb.
9. DB Lateral Raise bumped 9→12 lb starting Session 5 (Apr 30 hit 2×20 @ 9 lb at RIR 4-5).

## Workout C — Optional Swap

Use instead of A or B when fried, short on time, or joints feel off. Same prescription every time.

| Exercise | Sets | Reps | Weight | RIR |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Push-Up (feet on floor) | 3 | 15 | BW | 2 |
| Single-Arm DB Row | 3 | 15 | 30 | 2 |
| Heel-Elevated Goblet Squat | 3 | 15 | 50 | 2 |
| Seated Cable Row (neutral) | 3 | 15 | 60 | 2 |
| DB Lateral Raise | 3 | 20 | 8 | 1 |
| DB Hammer Curl | 2 | 12 | 20 | 1 |
| Triceps Rope Pushdown | 2 | 15 | 20 | 1 |
| Lying Leg Raise | 2 | 15 | BW | 2 |

See workout-log. Triceps OH ext flagged.

## Session 2 — Sat Apr 25 — Workout B [COMPLETED — UK travel adaptation]

See workout-log.

## Session 3 — Mon Apr 27 — Workout A [COMPLETED — partial]

Lower body fully skipped (back pain 2→3/10). Calves dropped. EZ-bar swapped to DB curl. Hanging leg raise skipped (back). See workout-log for actuals.

## Session 4 — Wed Apr 29 — Workout B [COMPLETED — partial]

DB Shoulder Press PR. RDL clean, zero back issues. Lat pulldown progression earned (90×12). Flat bench grinder. Accessories cut. See workout-log.

## Session 5 — Fri May 1 — Workout A

**⚠ BB Back Squat watch:** First squat back in since the back issue. Start with empty bar warm-up, probe at 75 lb, only proceed to 100 if zero discomfort. Bail to Heel-Elev Goblet Squat (3×10 @ 50 lb DB) at any twinge.

Bumps: Incline DB Bench 30→35 (Session 3 RIR 5), DB Lateral Raise 9→12 lb (Apr 30 hit 2×20 @ 9 at RIR 4-5 — well past top of range), DB Curl 18→22 (was easy Session 3). Lat Pulldown — push to 15 @ 90 before adding weight.

|---|---|---|---|---|
| Incline DB Bench | 3 | 8 | 35 | 2 |
| Chest-Supported DB Row | 3 | 10 | 35 | 2 |

| Lat Pulldown | 3 | 15 | 90 | 2 |
| DB Romanian Deadlift | 2 | 10 | 40 | 2 |
| DB Lateral Raise | 3 | 15 | 12 | 1 |
| DB Curl | 2 | 10 | 22 | 2 |
| Triceps Pushdown | 2 | 12 | 20 | 2 |
| Hanging Leg Raise | 2 | 12 | BW | 2 |
